## Summary

Describe the change in 2-4 lines.

## PR State

- [ ] Ready for review, not draft
- [ ] Branch is based on current `origin/main`
- [ ] Maintainer auto-merge desired after checks/review (`automerge` label)

## Scope

- bounded context(s):
- CLI/TUI surface:
- backend(s):

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] real canary (required for execution/setup/integration/sink changes)

## Review Loop

- [ ] Codex review requested or automatic Codex review confirmed
- [ ] CI failures investigated and resolved
- [ ] Review comments addressed or explicitly answered

## Docs

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] engineering/design/spec docs updated where needed

## Risks

List the real risks, regressions, or unresolved follow-ups.
